overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a futuristic industrial outpost. The character walks up metal ramps and through corridors with mixed artificial and natural lighting, transitioning from enclosed interior spaces to an open overlook with views of an alien rocky landscape.

large screen mounted on the wall showing data

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a metal ramp in an industrial facility. Metal staircases and support columns line the left side while an NPC stands near equipment at the top of the ramp ahead.

events.description: character reaches top of ramp and transitions to level walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial platform past the NPC

entered.detail: transparent glass wall separating walkway from adjacent area
simple metal bench along the right wall
elevated walkway with railings spanning above the corridor

segments.scene_description: Moving along a level industrial walkway with glass barriers on the right and metal staircases visible on the left. The area features overhead catwalks and transitions from the ramp to a more enclosed corridor.

events.description: approaching open exterior wall with natural sunlight illuminating the space

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge area toward the open overlook with exterior views

entered.detail: brown upholstered seating furniture with metal frame
low circular table next to the seating
large red rocky desert landscape visible through the open wall
large vehicle or ship parked outside on the landing pad
yellow triangular warning sign on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a lounge area with comfortable seating and small tables, transitioning toward an open overlook. Natural light streams in revealing a rocky alien landscape outside with a landed spacecraft visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile industrial facility that gradually opens into a bright overlook of an alien world. It begins as the character ascends a metal ramp flanked by support columns and staircases, moving toward an NPC stationed near equipment at the top. As the ascent ends, the camera glides along a level industrial walkway with glass barriers and overhead catwalks, transitioning from the open ramp into a more enclosed corridor. The scene then shifts into a lounge area furnished with seating and small tables before finally expanding toward a wide overlook. Natural light floods the space, revealing a rocky alien landscape and a landed spacecraft in the distance.
